partsWeight.Wiki: Override value for ragdoll weight physics behavior. -1 disables override. 0 causes the object to be treated as a rigid body.

bodySfxDmyId.Wiki: Specifies the dummy poly for SFX playback when broken. -1 uses the origin.

partsSfxDmyId.Wiki: Specifies the dummy poly for SFX playback when broken. -1 uses the origin.

bodySfxId.Wiki: Specifies the SFX to use for the body when broken.

partsSfxId.Wiki: Specifies the SFX to use for the part when broken.

baseSpeedWhenBreak.Wiki: The base initial speed used to move the weapon away from the target at the moment of detachment, in m/s. Note that this speed is independent of weight.

partsAnimeType.Wiki: How to animate the detached parts.

partsExplosionSfxDmyId.AltName: Part Explosion SFX Dummy Poly ID
partsExplosionSfxDmyId.Wiki: Part dummy poly for explosion SFX playback. -1 uses the origin.

bodyExplosionSfxDmyId.AltName: Body Explosion SFX Dummy Poly ID
bodyExplosionSfxDmyId.Wiki: Body dummy poly for explosion SFX playback. -1 uses the origin.

partsExplosionSfxId.Wiki: Specifies the SFX to use for the part explosion.

bodyExplosionSfxId.Wiki: Specifies the SFX to use for the body explosion.

Self.Wiki: Defines the behavior of broken parts.
